name_en: This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD clasp
'30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 21 x 13.5 x 7 cm
Number: M9234UTZQ_M928
